name: out-of-code-insights
description: Enhance your workflow with contextual annotations and collaborative comments stored outside the codebase, with AI integration and a dedicated chat participant.

chatParticipants.name: out-of-code-insights
chatParticipants.description: Enhance your workflow with contextual annotations and collaborative comments stored outside the codebase, with AI integration and a dedicated chat participant.

configuration.title: Out-of-Code Insights Configuration
configuration.description: Configure annotation colors, delays, providers, model, and other settings.

annotation.enableAnnotations.description: Enable annotation rendering and interaction across the editor, Tree View, CodeLens and native inline hints.

annotation.disabledTags.description: Hide annotations carrying any of these tags from native annotation views.

annotation.colors.light.annotation.description: Color of annotations in light theme

annotation.provider.description: LLM provider to use (openai, anthropic, azure, cerebras, deepseek, google, groq, meta, mistralai, ollama, openrouter, togetherai, xai, claude).

annotation.model.description: Model to use for the selected provider.

llm.apiKeys.description: API keys for all supported LLM providers.

annotation.colors.light.highlightBackgro.description: Highlight background for annotations in light theme

annotation.colors.light.commentBorder.description: Comment border color in light theme

annotation.colors.dark.annotation.description: Color of annotations in dark theme

annotation.colors.dark.highlightBackgrou.description: Highlight background for annotations in dark theme

annotation.colors.dark.commentBorder.description: Comment border color in dark theme

annotation.maxAnnotationsPerFile.description: Maximum number of annotations per file

annotation.inlayHints.enable.markdownDescription: Render annotations as interactive native Inlay Hints. Click the message to open it or the Move handle to pick it up. When disabled, the legacy non-interactive decoration label is used.

annotation.inlayHints.maxMessageLength.description: Maximum number of message characters shown in each interactive inline annotation.

annotation.github.repository.description: GitHub repository in the format 'owner/repo' to create issues from annotations.

annotation.enableAiSuggest.description: Enable or disable the AI Suggest Annotation feature.

annotation.path.description: Custom path to the annotations file or directory. If a directory is given, an annotations.json file will be created inside it.

annotation.defaultSeverity.description: Default severity level for new annotations.

annotation.severityStyles.description: Decoration style per severity (better-comments style). Each entry overrides the theme defaults from annotation.colors; tag styles (annotation.tagStyles) take precedence over severity styles.

annotationColor.description: Color of the inline annotation text (CSS color, e.g. '#ff8800' or 'orange').

backgroundColor.description: Background color of the annotated line (CSS color).

border.description: Color of the left border of the annotated line (CSS color).

gutterIcon.description: Show the gutter icon for matching annotations.

annotation.tagStyles.description: Decoration style per tag (better-comments style). The first tag of an annotation (in tag order) that has an entry here overrides the severity style and the theme defaults from annotation.colors.

annotationColor.description: Color of the inline annotation text (CSS color, e.g. '#ff8800' or 'orange').

backgroundColor.description: Background color of the annotated line (CSS color).

border.description: Color of the left border of the annotated line (CSS color).

gutterIcon.description: Show the gutter icon for matching annotations.

annotation.userProfile.description: User profile for annotation generation (affects AI suggestions and templates).

annotation.enableProfileBasedSuggestions.description: Enable profile-based AI suggestions for annotations.

annotation.claudeUseSDK.description: Use Claude Code SDK with automatic fallback to REST API if SDK fails.

annotation.docs.outputPath.description: Workspace-relative folder where 'Generate Annotation Documentation' writes the DocFX-compatible Markdown site (toc.yml, index.md, by-type.md, by-file.md, links.md).

annotation.docs.siteTitle.description: Title of the generated documentation site. Empty = 'Annotations — <workspace name>'.

annotation.docs.tagPrefix.description: Tag prefix that marks documentation roles (module/class/function/method/example/guide).

annotation.docs.apiFolder.description: Subfolder (single path segment) of the output folder where authored API pages are written.

annotation.docs.guideFile.description: File name of the assembled guide page.

annotation.docs.includeInventory.description: Generate the inventory pages (by-type.md, by-file.md, links.md) alongside the authored documentation.

annotation.docs.includeAuthored.description: Assemble authored API/guide pages from annotations carrying documentation-role tags.

annotation.docs.includeTimestamp.description: Stamp each generated page with the generation date. Disable for fully diffable output.

annotation.docs.frontMatter.description: Prepend a YAML front-matter block (title) to every generated documentation page — used by DocFX and most static site generators. Leave disabled when the docs are read on GitHub (front matter renders as a visible table there).

annotation.docs.untaggedLabel.description: Bucket label used for annotations without tags in the inventory pages.

annotation.docs.watch.description: Regenerate the annotation documentation automatically when annotations change.

annotation.pro.licenseServerUrl.description: URL of the license validation server for Pro features. Empty (default): license validation is skipped and no Pro entitlement is granted — the extension stays fully free as long as no feature is gated.

annotation.pro.offlineGraceDays.description: Number of days a successfully validated license keeps unlocking Pro features while the license server is unreachable.

annotation.pro.gatedFeatures.description: Feature ids that require a valid Pro entitlement. Empty (default): every feature stays free.

annotation.sync.serverUrl.description: Base URL of the annotation sync server (the license server exposing /v1/workspaces). Empty (default): cloud sync is disabled and the sync status bar item is hidden.

annotation.sync.workspaceId.description: Identifier of the shared workspace on the sync server. Annotations are pulled from / pushed to /v1/workspaces/<id>/annotations.

annotation.sync.auto.description: Automatically sync annotations: pull once on activation, then push local changes 5 seconds after they settle.

annotation.watchExternalChanges.description: Reload annotations automatically when annotations.json is modified outside VS Code (e.g. by the MCP server or another tool).

annotation.commentsView.description: Render annotations as native editor comment threads (Comments API): gutter '+' creates an annotation, replies extend its discussion thread. Changing this setting takes effect on the next activation (reload the window).

annotation.cutRecoveryWindowSeconds.description: How long (in seconds) an annotation whose code was cut or deleted waits for the content to be pasted back before asking whether to keep or delete the annotation.

enumDescriptions: All messages including verbose debug output
outOfCodeInsights.logLevel.description: Minimum log level written to the Out-of-Code Insights output channel and log file.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:ci && npm run format:check
scripts.pretest: npm run typecheck && npm run compile-tests
